decisions.reasoning: Glacial Lance is a guaranteed OHKO on Tornadus-Therian. Even though Tornadus-Therian outspeeds, it cannot KO Calyrex-Ice in one turn, making this the optimal play to secure an immediate advantage.

Calyrex-Ice is at 67% HP and Incineroar's Flare Blitz is a 2HKO, meaning Calyrex-Ice will likely be KO'd before it can secure the 2HKO with High Horsepower. Switching to my own Incineroar allows me to Intimidate the opponent and safely pivot or check their physical attackers.

Since both Incineroars are mirroring each other and doing minimal damage, Parting Shot allows me to pivot out safely, lower the opponent's stats, and bring in a more offensive threat to gain momentum.
Since we are in a speed tie and the opponent's moves do minimal damage, Knock Off is the best play to remove their item and gain information without committing to a switch or a recoil move.

Flutter Mane is guaranteed to be OHKOed by Flare Blitz and cannot secure a KO this turn. Switching to Incineroar provides a safe pivot to resist the incoming Fire-type attack and gain Intimidate value.
Since both Incineroars resist each other's primary STAB moves and are in a speed tie, Parting Shot is the best way to gain momentum, lower the opponent's stats, and bring in a teammate safely.
Since we are in a speed tie and neither Incineroar can OHKO the other, Knock Off is the optimal play to remove their item and gain information while dealing consistent damage.

High Horsepower is a 2HKO and deals significant damage to Incineroar. Since I am at 67% HP and Flare Blitz is a 2HKO, I must prioritize the 2HKO path to secure the KO before Incineroar can finish me off.
Glacial Lance is a guaranteed OHKO on Rillaboom. Even though Rillaboom outspeeds, Calyrex-Ice can survive one hit and secure the KO immediately.
Calyrex-Ice has fainted, so I must send in a new Pokemon. Incineroar is the best choice to check Rillaboom due to Intimidate and its resistance to Grass-type moves.
Flare Blitz is a guaranteed OHKO on Rillaboom, fulfilling the primary decision priority to secure a KO when available.
